summary: Phase C testing complete. All 31 tests passed (100%). Multilingual support (7 languages), translation pipeline via Claude, HITL review system, and proactive SAV disruption notifications all working correctly.
passed_tests: Language Detection - French (fr) correctly detected
Language Detection - English (en) correctly detected
Language Detection - Wolof (wo) correctly detected
Language Detection - Fon (fon) correctly detected
Language Detection - Yoruba (yo) correctly detected
Language Detection - Hausa (ha) correctly detected
Language Detection - Swahili (sw) correctly detected
Language Detection - Unknown text defaults to French
Translation Pipeline - FR/EN skip translation (confidence 1.0)
Translation Pipeline - Wolof translated to French via Claude
Translation Pipeline - Swahili translated to French via Claude
HITL Threshold - confidence < 0.85 triggers review
HITL Threshold - amount > 500 EUR triggers review
HITL Threshold - combined logic works correctly
HITL API - trigger_human_review creates review in MongoDB
HITL API - GET /api/hitl/reviews returns pending reviews
HITL API - resolve_review marks review as resolved
HITL API - POST /api/hitl/reviews/{id}/resolve works via API
Disruption - POST /api/disruptions/notify DELAY type works
Disruption - POST /api/disruptions/notify GATE_CHANGE type works
Disruption - POST /api/disruptions/notify SCHEDULE_CHANGE type works
Disruption - GET /api/disruptions/events/{booking_ref} returns events
Disruption - Invalid booking_ref returns failed status
Disruption - Invalid disruption type returns error
Disruption - Missing booking_ref returns error
Disruption Auto-Actions - DELAY > 120min offers rebooking (MODIFICATION_REQUESTED state)
Disruption Auto-Actions - CANCELLATION triggers auto-refund (status=cancelled_by_airline, refund_status=PROCESSED)
Shadow Profile - language_pref updated on language detection
Multilingual Flow - Wolof message processed (triggers translation pipeline)
Multilingual Flow - Swahili message processed (triggers translation pipeline)
Disruption Events - Events stored in booking.disruption_events array
critical_code_review_comments: detect_language_extended correctly uses keyword matching for 7 languages (fr, en, wo, fon, yo, ha, sw)
translate_to_french correctly delegates to Claude for African languages, returns original for fr/en
HITL thresholds correctly set: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.85, HIGH_VALUE_THRESHOLD_EUR=500.0
HITL reviews stored in MongoDB with proper structure (review_id, status, phone_masked, etc.)
Disruption notifications correctly store events in booking.disruption_events array
Auto-refund on CANCELLATION correctly updates booking status to cancelled_by_airline
Rebooking offer for DELAY > 120min correctly sets session state to MODIFICATION_REQUESTED
Shadow profile language_pref correctly updated on language detection

mocked_apis.note: Payment drivers in MOCK mode, Claude AI is real (via Emergent LLM Key)
mocked_list: WhatsApp Cloud API - Token invalid (messages logged only)
real_integrations: Claude AI - Real via Emergent LLM Key (translation pipeline working)

test_credentials: No auth required. Use POST /api/test/simulate with {phone, message}. API Base URL: https://voice-travel-booking.preview.emergentagent.com. For disruption tests, use booking TRV-ZT3GEM (confirmed, payment_driver=celtiis_cash). For language tests, use fresh phone numbers +22990PHASEC*.
seed_data_creation: Tests use unique phone numbers: +22990PHASEC01-07 for HITL and language tests. Test booking TRV-CANCEL* created and cleaned up for cancellation auto-refund test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C testing complete (Iteration 12). All features verified: (1) Multilingual Support: 7 languages detected (fr, en, wo, fon, yo, ha, sw) via keyword matching in detect_language_extended. (2) Translation Pipeline: African languages translated to French via Claude Sonnet 4.5, fr/en processed directly. (3) HITL: confidence < 0.85 or amount > 500 EUR triggers human review, reviews stored in MongoDB hitl_reviews collection, GET/POST APIs working. (4) Proactive SAV: DELAY, GATE_CHANGE, SCHEDULE_CHANGE, CANCELLATION notifications working. CANCELLATION auto-triggers refund (status=cancelled_by_airline). DELAY > 120min offers rebooking (MODIFICATION_REQUESTED state). Events stored in booking.disruption_events array. (5) Shadow profile language_pref updated on language detection. All payment drivers remain in MOCK mode. Claude AI is real via Emergent LLM Key.
